purpose: Correlate logs, monitoring signals, benchmark validity, and deployment-readiness evidence without actuating a deployment.

micro.loop: normalize, correlate, and bound log evidence
micro.evidence: timestamped source references, error signatures, and missing intervals

micro.loop: compare signals against explicit SLI and SLO windows
micro.evidence: window, numerator, denominator, thresholds, and uncertainty

micro.loop: test baseline comparability and measurement validity
micro.evidence: workload, environment, samples, dispersion, and regression threshold

micro.loop: reconcile readiness claims with receipts and rollback evidence
micro.evidence: artifact hashes, gate results, rollback proof, and unresolved blockers

clusterContract.meso: Four read-only Hopf-separated evidence lanes exchange typed seals through the gyroid medium; no lane shares mutable state.
clusterContract.macro: An outside-context judge may issue proceed, revise, or collapse; proceed requires at least two accepted lane digests and remains non-actuating.
antiGoodhart: Never optimize a metric without preserving its workload, window, denominator, and uncertainty.
Treat missing logs, dropped samples, warm-cache bias, observer overhead, and incomparable environments as evidence gaps.
A deployment-readiness seal is not deployment authority.

roles.title: log correlation and forensic analyst
roles.mission: Extract bounded event sequences, causal candidates, and coverage gaps from logs without treating log absence as success.

roles.title: monitoring and SLO analyst
roles.mission: Evaluate service indicators, alert windows, blind spots, and error budgets against declared objectives.

roles.title: benchmark methodology and regression analyst
roles.mission: Determine whether benchmark runs are comparable, statistically useful, and relevant to deployment risk.

roles.title: deployment evidence and rollback auditor
roles.mission: Reconcile readiness claims, receipts, monitoring coverage, and rollback proof while refusing to grant deployment authority.
